calendar.matters:
Petition To Establish Trusts Claim Of Ownership To Property, For Order Directing Its Transfer To Trust And For Related Claims Of Breach Of Contract; F
Off Calendar Aug-22-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Levin for Charles Sakai. Harold Smith for Barbara Comer.

The Court approved the Petition for Approval of the Settlement Agreement with the exception of the addendum (subject to review/modification of the order). The Petition to Establish Trusts Claim of Ownership was taken off calendar.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Sep-01-2011 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Establish Trusts Claim Of Ownership To Property, For Order Directing Its Transfer To Trust And For Related Claims Of Breach Of Contract; F
Off Calendar Jun-27-2011 Continued To Aug-22-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Establish Trusts Claim Of Ownership To Property, For Order Directing Its Transfer To Trust And For Related Claims Of Breach Of Contract; F
Off Calendar Apr-18-2011 Continued To Jun-27-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Krista Shoquist for Barbara Comer (Respondent). Jessica Williams for Charles Sakai.

Counsel stated that they agreed to mediate, that mediation was scheduled for May 12, 2011 and that they agreed to a continuance. The Petition to Establish Trust's Claim of Ownership to Property, etc. was continued to June 27, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel is to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by June 22, 2011.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.
